personal.preferred_title: Senior Data Engineer | Capacity Planning & AI-Driven Infrastructure Optimization
personal.address: Murphy, TX (Plano area) / 424 Oriole Dr., Murphy, TX 75094

summary: Senior Data Engineer with over 20 years of enterprise experience, specializing in performance engineering and scalability testing. Proficient in analyzing performance bottlenecks and implementing monitoring solutions using APM tools like Dynatrace and Grafana. Skilled in cloud native scalability testing and integrating testing tools with CI/CD pipelines to enhance system reliability. Adept at defining SLA and SLO benchmarks, developing performance test scripts, and driving infrastructure performance testing initiatives. Experienced in Agile and Waterfall methodologies, ensuring alignment with project goals. Eager to contribute to Peyton Resource Group’s mission by optimizing performance testing practices and scalability frameworks.

flagship_projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform (AWS)
flagship_projects.description: Designed a full serverless data platform using S3, Glue, Athena, and Bedrock. Built a Text-to-SQL GenAI agent with Claude 3 Sonnet. Resolved small file issues using Snappy and Parquet compression. Optimized ETL and data access for enterprise scalability.

flagship_projects.description: Replaced legacy manual Trenda processes with a parallel generator-based pipeline, reducing forecasting cycles by 90%. Featured comprehensive documentation and performance benchmarks.

flagship_projects.name: FAST Project
flagship_projects.description: Conducted data mining on user performance metrics to optimize critical money-generating systems.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Architected automated ETL pipelines using Python/Pandas to ingest P95 telemetry from 6,000+ endpoints, enhancing performance monitoring.
Developed ML forecasting models with Prophet and scikit-learn to predict capacity bottlenecks 6 months ahead, improving provisioning accuracy.
Identified underutilized infrastructure through data mining, driving hardware consolidation and cost savings.
Integrated disparate data feeds into unified Oracle reporting systems with executive dashboards for performance visibility.
Administered BMC TrueSight for infrastructure monitoring, configuring thresholds, alerts, and baselines.
Applied statistical analysis and ML in Python to uncover patterns in underutilized infrastructure, supporting scalability initiatives.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Managed Dynatrace AppMon/Synthetics for Brand.com and critical systems, focusing on performance monitoring.
Led 'FAST' project to data-mine real-user performance metrics, providing optimization recommendations.
Upgraded Dynatrace from 6.5 to 7.0, implemented TLS1.2 security, and supported cloud migration to AWS.
Analyzed bottlenecks and suggested performance improvements to enhance system scalability.
Provided end-to-end monitoring and dashboarding for before/after performance metrics.
Participated in integrating Performance Center with Dynatrace for comprehensive testing.

experience.title: APM Consultant
bullets: Supported enterprise CA APM, CEM, and ADA for utility systems, ensuring performance reliability.
Managed and supported monitoring solutions to identify and resolve performance issues.

experience.title: SME for CA APM (Senior Consultant)
bullets: Led large-scale CA APM implementations and upgrades (9.1 to 10.1), managing 4,000–6,000 agents for performance monitoring.
Designed custom Management Modules, dashboards, and alerts to enhance visibility into system performance.
Provided sizing recommendations and bottleneck resolution for J2EE/.NET environments.
Collaborated with IT teams to troubleshoot performance issues in WebLogic environments.
Created Perl/Ksh data extraction scripts to support performance analysis.
Trained client teams on APM solutions, ensuring effective adoption and use.

experience.title: Performance Test Engineer
bullets: Analyzed J2EE telecom applications for load and break points, identifying performance bottlenecks.
Documented key metrics including JDBC connections, threads, memory, CPU, and GC for optimization.
Installed JMX, Thread Dumps, and Wily Introscope for performance monitoring.
Created automation scripts to streamline performance testing processes.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Led migration of 200+ MySQL nodes to a 6-node Oracle RAC cluster for a high-throughput shopping engine.
Optimized C++/OCCI transaction processing, reducing hardware footprint by 95% while maintaining sub-second latency.
Built CPPUNIT testing framework to automate conversion and ensure performance standards.
Enhanced system scalability through strategic refactoring and performance tuning.

experience.title: Architect/Developer (IRS CADE Project)
bullets: Performed UML-based unit design for a CICS/MQSeries/XML/DB2 system, focusing on performance.
Developed modules for IRS modernization, ensuring efficient processing.
Worked on messaging architecture with VC++ and DB2 for optimal performance.

experience.title: Developer / Support Engineer (Billing, Interfaces, CSM/PRMS)
bullets: Developed high-availability multithreaded C++ interfaces using POSIX, sockets, and Marconi APIs.
Achieved 75% memory reduction and 20% throughput gain in billing performance tuning (C/C++/Pro*C/PL/SQL).
Improved database performance by 10x through sequence optimization.
Automated system administration for WebLogic/WebSphere with Korn Shell scripts.
Troubleshot Enabler/CSM/EMS modules, enhancing system reliability.
Designed and implemented interfaces using UML in Rational Rose for performance efficiency.
